data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for real-time availability sync to Google.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for real-time availability sync to Google, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for this sync, yet the actual implementation or verification of this sync is absent from the evidence provided. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence to assert a hard requirement failure.
gaps: No evidence of real-time availability sync to Google.
